ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track where the event was held */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the racing event */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface the event was held on (e.g., turf, dirt) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of racing event (e.g., flat, jump) */,
  "appid" INTEGER /* App ID of the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of horses participating in the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the event */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_events_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Type of track surface (e.g., synthetic, turf, dirt) */,
  "track_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the track */,
  "track_slope" REAL /* Slope of the track */,
  "track_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the track (e.g., clockwise, counterclockwise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse (e.g., male, female, neuter) */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer of the horse */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the horse was born */,
  "coat_color" TEXT /* Color of the horse's coat */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the horse */,
  "last_vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the horse's last vaccination */,
  "last_race_date" TEXT /* Date of the horse's last race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the jockey in years */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer associated with the jockey */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the jockey is from */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the jockey */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the jockey */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of races won by the jockey */,
  "last_race_date" TEXT /* Date of the jockey's last race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse participating in the event */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jockey participating in the event */,
  "finishing_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the horse in the event */,
  "winning_time" REAL /* Winning time of the horse in the event */,
  "odds" REAL /* Betting odds for the horse in the event */,
  "prize_money_won" REAL /* Prize money won by the horse in the event */,
  "horse_weight" REAL /* Weight of the horse during the event */,
  "jockey_weight" REAL /* Weight of the jockey during the event */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the event */,
  "finishing_time" REAL /* Finishing time of the horse in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_results_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id")
)
